question: Is the foreground dominated by a vast golden ripe wheat field with wheat ears hanging low?
Is there a grayish-brown wild hare crouching in the lower left corner with its ears perked up?
Are there exactly three blue cornflower wildflowers in the lower right corner?
Are there trampled wheat stalks visible in the lower right corner?
Is an elderly farmer standing on the right side of the foreground along the field ridge?
Is the farmer wearing an indigo blue coarse cotton shirt and an earth-yellow straw hat?
Is the farmer gazing into the distance with a wooden-handled iron shovel resting on his shoulder?
Is there a black and white patterned sheepdog lying at the farmer's feet?
Is the sheepdog depicted with its tongue out panting?
Is there a rust-covered dark green vintage bicycle positioned behind the farmer?
Is there a sickle clamped to the rear rack of the bicycle?
Is there a large red combine harvester operating in the left middle ground?
Is the text 'HARVEST PRO 9000' clearly visible and correctly spelled on the harvester?
Is pale yellow chaff and dust billowing up behind the combine harvester?
Is there a dark green agricultural three-wheeled truck parked on a muddy dirt road in the right middle ground?
Is the truck's cargo bed filled with golden wheat grains half-covered by a grayish-white canvas?
Are there exactly two young men beside the truck wearing blue coarse cotton short-sleeved shirts?
Are the two young men working together to hoist a bulging white woven sack onto the truck bed?
Is there a pile of approximately seven or eight woven sacks on the ground near the truck?
Is there a row of approximately six or seven low earth-yellow farmhouses with dark red clay tile roofs in the distant background?
Is there a large patch of golden grain spread out to dry on the threshing floor in front of the farmhouses?
Are there exactly two tall green walnut trees beside the farmhouses?
Is there a cylindrical gray cement water tower beside the farmhouses?
Are there exactly seven white wind turbines with massive rotating blades on the far horizon?
Is the sky deep azure blue with a few fluffy cumulus clouds?
Is there a brown eagle soaring/circling high in the sky?
Are the hands and limbs of the farmer and young men free from severe distortion (e.g., extra fingers, melted hands)?
Are the animals (hare, sheepdog, eagle) free from obvious anatomical deformities?
Is the image free from severe artifacts, glitching, or unreadable blobs?
